title: Cannot log into my account
description: User is unable to log in after password reset. Getting an 'Invalid Credentials' error despite multiple attempts.

title: Billing details not updating
description: When trying to update credit card details, the page hangs and eventually times out. Needs urgent attention as customer subscription is expiring.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: Customer requesting a dark mode toggle for the main dashboard interface. This has been requested multiple times.

title: Application crashes on exporting PDF
description: The application crashes completely when attempting to export reports as PDF. Occurs consistently on Chrome and Firefox.

title: Typo on the landing page
description: Found a typo on the main landing page under the 'Features' section. 'Availabe' should be 'Available'.

title: Account verification email not received
description: Signup completed but the verification email has not arrived even after 24 hours. Checked spam folder as well.

title: API rate limit exceeded too quickly
description: Developer reporting that the standard API rate limits are being triggered after only 10 requests.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: Uploading a valid JPEG image (under 2MB) results in an 'Unsupported format' error message.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Users in the EU region are experiencing intermittent timeouts when checking out via Stripe gateway.

title: Mobile app push notifications failing
description: Push notifications are not being delivered to iOS users on the latest app build version 2.4.1.
